professional_skills.name: Craft
professional_skills.description: Creating, repairing, and evaluating goods within a chosen craft specialty.

professional_skills.name: Culture
professional_skills.description: Knowledge of a specific society's customs, laws, taboos, and history.

professional_skills.name: Exhort
professional_skills.description: Theistic prayer and ritual appeal used to call on a god or cult for divine magic.

professional_skills.name: Invocation
professional_skills.description: Sorcerous casting skill used to invoke spells from a cult, school, or grimoire.

professional_skills.name: Lockpicking
professional_skills.description: Opening locks without the proper key and bypassing simple physical security.

professional_skills.name: Meditation
professional_skills.description: Focused concentration used to enter deep mental states and maintain mystical talents.

professional_skills.name: Mysticism
professional_skills.description: Knowledge and practice of a mystical path used to awaken and direct supernatural talents.

professional_skills.name: Navigation
professional_skills.description: Finding a route through unfamiliar terrain or waters using maps, stars, landmarks, and local signs.

professional_skills.name: Seamanship
professional_skills.description: Handling ships, sails, ropes, watches, and other practical duties at sea.

professional_skills.name: Shaping
professional_skills.description: Sorcerous technique for altering a spell's range, duration, targets, and other parameters.

professional_skills.name: Sleight
professional_skills.description: Manual dexterity for palming objects, picking pockets, tricks, and other subtle hand work.
